title: Diocese of San Bernardino dispenses worshipers from obligation to attend mass on Sundays
description_html:
The Diocese of San Bernardino, Bishop Alberto Rojas, issued a decree dispensing members from their obligation to attend mass due to rising fears of immigration enforcement. Such an action is rare and reserved for extenuating circumstances, such as the pandemic. Bishop Rojas is at least the second Diocese in the United States to issue such a decree in light of increasing immigration enforcement by the Trump administration.
